_notifications_printReminderBody.translation: Your film roll for " {{bestName}} " is 80% full. Don't forget to send it to print.

_notifications_requestApprovedTitle.translation: Your Participation Request has been Approved!

_notifications_requestApprovedBody.translation: You can participate in the " {{activityName}} " activity.

_notifications_requestRejectedBody.translation: Your request to participate in the activity " {{activityName}} " was not accepted.
